spacing_and_layout.general_spacing: Generous spacing. p-8 or p-12 for major containers.
spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid. Dense, strict hierarchy. Use border-collapse style. No soft margins.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Strict optical alignment. Left-aligned for body and forms. Center-aligned for Hero terminal prompts.

surfaces_and_borders.card_style: Flat solid black background (#050A05), 1px solid green border (#166534 or #22C55E), NO border radius (rounded-none).
surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: FORBIDDEN. Use solid black with green borders.
surfaces_and_borders.shadows: Text shadow or box shadow for glowing effects ONLY. shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(34,197,94,0.3)] or drop-shadow.

components.button: Solid black background, 1px green border, green text. On hover: solid green background, black text. NO border radius. Add a preceding '>' or wrap in '[ ]' for CLI feel.
components.input: Transparent background, 1px bottom border (green-900), focus border green-500. Text green. No rounded corners.
components.card: border border-green-500/50 bg-black text-green-500 p-6 rounded-none
components.navigation: Top bar, solid black, 1px bottom green border. Logo on left, links right.
components.timer: Large monospace numbers, green. Changes to yellow/red when low time. Include text glow. text-[4vw]
components.progress_bar: Instead of a smooth bar, use ASCII progress like [######----] or discrete blocks.

animations.transitions: Instant transitions or very fast (duration-75) to mimic old terminals.
animations.special_effects: Blinking cursor (border-r-2 animate-pulse), typewriter effect for initial welcome, subtle CSS scanline overlay.

image_urls.description: Green grid pattern on black background, use at very low opacity (10-20%) as a body background overlay behind the scanlines.

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g. data-testid='start-quiz-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark green-on-black terminal aesthetic.
Do NOT use 'rounded' classes. Everything must have rounded-none.
Use Shadcn components but override their styles to remove border-radius, shadows, and default colors. Force them into the green/black theme.

Add a fixed, screen-covering div with pointer-events-none for scanlines: background: linear-gradient(rgba(18, 16, 16, 0) 50%, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.25) 50%), linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255, 0, 0, 0.06), rgba(0, 255, 0, 0.02), rgba(0, 0, 255, 0.06)); background-size: 100% 2px, 3px 100%; z-index: 50;
Include 'JetBrains Mono' font via Google Fonts in index.html.
In the Quiz Gameplay screen, highlight wrong answers in red (#EF4444) and correct answers in green (#22C55E).
Timer should flash red when < 5 seconds.
Incorporate ASCII decorations in the UI, e.g., '=== LEADERBOARD ===' instead of standard headings.
